title: The Lady with the Dog
author: Anton Chekhov

sections.title: First Meeting
sections.description: Gurov notices Anna and her white Pomeranian at the Yalta resort

sections.title: The Affair Begins
sections.description: Their romance develops amid the beauty of Yalta
sections.emotionalTone: passion, guilt, temporary escape from reality

sections.title: Departure and Separation
sections.description: Anna returns to her husband, Gurov to his life in Moscow
sections.emotionalTone: regret, assumed finality, return to routine

sections.title: The Reunion
sections.description: Gurov seeks out Anna in her hometown, reigniting their connection

sections.title: True Love Revealed
sections.description: Both realize their affair has become genuine, lasting love
sections.emotionalTone: profound recognition, bittersweet acceptance, mature love

guidelines: 5 thematic sections following Chekhov's transformation arc, spoiler-free headers, progression from casual to profound love
